Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Mar-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Benjamin Mayshack and Barry Ward. Kimberly Cox in Propria Persona.

Mr. Vann stated that there is a dispute between the three Beneficiaries/Administrators regarding expenses paid by Ms. Cox, that all of the assets are in a blocked account, that he sees no reason why all three Parties can't waive an accounting and that he needs about 45-days. Ms. Cox stated that she has no idea if she is represented by an attorney or if she is representing herself. Mr. Vann suggested mediation. Mr. Vann on behalf of his Clients and Ms. Cox agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 3, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 24, 2015. Status on administration of the estate was continued to and the Parties are to return on March 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Benjamin Mayshack and Barry Ward. Kimberly Cox in Propria Persona.

The Parties indicated that there has been an issue with communication. Ms. Cox stated that she was not informed by Mr. Vann that she had been suspended, raised the issue of reimbursement for storage fees, legal fees, costs of inspection reports, payment of taxes, etc. and stated that Mr. Stokes has/is holding $5,000.00 from the sale of the property. Mr. Mayshack stated that he does not want any of the personal property. Mr. Ward stated that he wants some pictures and a love seat. All Parties provided current addresses, phone numbers and e mail addresses. The Court informed Ms. Cox that some of the expenses need to come out of the Trust. Ms. Cox will provide a copy of the Trust, a list/accounting of the expenses to Mr. Vann for Mr. Mayshack's review, make sure Mr. Ward receives the items he requested and will close out the storage unit. It was noted that an order validating the Trust was issued in case number PTR-13-296718 on August 1, 2013. The Court rescinds the order suspending Ms. Cox' powers (order for the same to be issued). Status on administration of the Estate was set for December 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Benjamin Mayshack and for Berry Ward.

The Court noted that no appearance was made Kimberly Cox. Mr. Vann stated that he has not heard a word from Ms. Cox. The Court suspended Ms. Cox powers as Co-Administrator. Mr. Vann stated that he will file the date of death bank statements. No future status dates were set.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Text Ruling

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Continued To Jul-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Benjamin Mayshack and Barry Ward.

The Court noted that Ms. Cox was not present. Mr. Vann stated that he has not heard from Ms. Cox, that he has the bank statements and corrected inventory from date of death, and that the statements do not show any missing funds. Mr. Vann also stated that there were automatic payments of utility bills, that there were two blocked bank accounts ($25,000.00 and $400,000.00), that the accounts are held in Wells Fargo and in all three names, that Ms. Cox directed the bank to send the statements to her and that Ms. Cox has possession of the vehicle. The Court will issue An Order to Appear directing Ms. Cox to appear on July 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 stating that she may be suspended or removed if she does not appear on that day. The status hearing is also continued to that date. Mr. Vann is to file the inventory.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Benjamin Mayshack.

Mr. Vann stated that he ordered bank statements from date of death to the time Mr. Stokes removed the funds, that he expects to have them in about six weeks and that the inventory was based upon what Mr. Stokes reported he withdrew from the account. The Court expressed about Ms. Cox not being present. Status on filing of a final/complete inventory and appraisal was continued to June 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will issue a Notice to Appear to Ms. Cox to appear on that same date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Benjamin Mayshack and for Barry Ward.

Mr. Vann stated that he does not believe Ms. Cox is represented by Counsel, that he placed several calls to her and that he received no response. The Court expressed concern about Mr. Stokes having received the checks payable to him and the date of death amounts. Mr. Vann indicated that he and Mr. Mayshack will make contact with the Bank and attempt to obtain bank statements. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on date of death amounts/bank statements.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: G. Cat Stokes for and with Benjamin Mayshack, Kimberly Ward Cox and for Barry Ward.

Mr. Stokes presented copies of two cashiers checks in the amount of $260,000.00 and $173,745.67, copies of bank statements verifying those amounts and copies of the withdrawal slips/checks used to withdraw the funds. Mr. Stokes also stated that Wells Fargo Bank will now open the blocked account based on the order for probate, explained why he signed for the funds, stated that he has possession of the cashiers checks and that he will open the blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank. In addition, Mr. Stokes stated that the only thing left to do is to deposit the funds into the blocked, that the house was in the Trust, and that the house was sold and distributed. Ms. Cox and Mr. Mayshack stated that they understood what was going on. Furthermore, Mr. Stokes stated that Mr. Ward may be available next week and that Mr. Mayshack will be leaving the Country on Friday. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts was continued to October 22, 2013 at 11:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipts For The Blocked Accounts

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: G. Cat Stokes for the three Co-Administrators.

Mr. Stokes stated that the receipts for the blocked accounts are not filed because the Bank is reluctant to release the funds, and asked for more time to collect the funds and have them placed in a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts was continued to October 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the receipts are not filed by that date, all three Personal Representatives are to be present.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
